body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Social Incarnation** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Intersubjectivity — second-person neuroscience, embodied empathy, shared intentionality, social predictive processing.

**An integrative perspective on the role of touch in the development of intersubjectivity.**. Brain Cogn.. PMID: 36162247. DOI: 10.1016/j.bandc.2022.105915. Touch concerns afundamental component of sociality. In this review, we examine the hypothesis that somatomotor development constitutes acrucial psychophysiological element in the ontogeny of intersubjectivity. An interdisciplinary perspective is provided on how the communication channel of touch contributes to the sense of self and extends to the social self.
